results.expectedMeaning: Lymphocyte % and/or absolute lymphocyte count is below the configured threshold.
results.expectedAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Perform additional review/confirmation per SOP if clinically indicated.
results.popupMeaning: Lymphocyte % and/or absolute lymphocyte count is below the configured threshold.
results.popupAction: Correlate with clinical context and prior results. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Perform additional review/confirmation per SOP if clinically indicated.

results.expectedMeaning: RDW-CV result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
results.expectedAction: Correlate with CBC indices and clinical history. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review if required by SOP.
results.popupMeaning: RDW-CV result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
results.popupAction: Correlate with CBC indices and clinical history. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Consider smear review if required by SOP.

results.expectedMeaning: HGB result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
results.expectedAction: Confirm plausibility and specimen condition. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Apply critical value reporting/escalation procedures if required by local policy.
results.popupMeaning: HGB result is above the laboratory-configured high threshold.
results.popupAction: Confirm plausibility and specimen condition. Repeat measurement if unexpected. Apply critical value reporting/escalation procedures if required by local policy.

results.expectedMeaning: Internal signals suggest reduced reliability of RBC/CBC-related results (e.g., RBC/Hb/Hct/indices).
results.expectedAction: 1) Do not report without additional verification. 2) Repeat measurement. 3) Check specimen condition (mixing, microclots, hemolysis/lipemia, storage time). 4) Review smear/stain quality and cell images; consider manual confirmation per SOP. 5) If unresolved, re-smear/re-stain and repeat and/or request recollection per local policy.
results.popupMeaning: Internal signals suggest reduced reliability of RBC/CBC-related results (e.g., RBC/Hb/Hct/indices).
results.popupAction: 1) Do not report without additional verification. 2) Repeat measurement. 3) Check specimen condition (mixing, microclots, hemolysis/lipemia, storage time). 4) Review smear/stain quality and cell images; consider manual confirmation per SOP. 5) If unresolved, re-smear/re-stain and repeat and/or request recollection per local policy.
